Video.summary: A private pre-season event held in a secret warehouse in Budapest, Hungary, the inaugural Karate Combat: Genesis event took place on February 3, 2018. The event showcases the incredible depth of the fight roster highlighting many karate legends in various weight classes, competing for the first time ever in this new sporting league.
Video.grandparentTitle: KARATE COMBAT: GENESIS - Reda Messaoudi vs. Luiz Rocha
Video.title: KARATE COMBAT: GENESIS - Reda Messaoudi vs. Luiz Rocha

Video.summary: Any world-class MMA fighter is fearless. Then there’s Nick Agallar who spent 16 months serving his country in Iraq. His opponent Debrah is lightning fast, dishes out lethal strikes and got a few grappling lessons from the Gracie clan along the way.

Video.summary: Live from Hollywood, CA on January 24, 2019, Karate Combat: Hollywood kicks off Karate Combat's sophomore season. Held at the Avalon, the former Hollywood Palace building, near the famous intersection of Hollywood and Vine. Nadege Ait-Ibrahim v. Ana Luiza Ferreira.

KARATE COMBAT: HOLLYWOOD - Nadege Ait-Ibrahim v. Ana Luiza Ferreira
KARATE COMBAT: HOLLYWOOD - Nadege Ait-Ibrahim v. Ana Luiza Ferreira

Video.summary: Live from New York City, NY on Sept. 27, 2018, Karate Combat: One World is the third event of the Karate Combat fighting league's inaugural season. Heldatop the Freedom Tower on the 102nd Floor Observation Deck of One World Trade Center building. On the Main Card: Abdalla Ibrahim of the US/Egypt vs.Dionicio Gustavo of Dominican Republic. The co-main event features Brazil’s Luis Rocha and Dimitris Triantafyllis of Greece. A stacked card of 9 fights also featuresElhadji Ndour, Josh Quayhagen, and newcomers Adilet Shadykanov and Edgars Skrivers.
Video.grandparentTitle: KARATE COMBAT: ONE WORLD - Abdalla Ibrahim vs. Dionicio Gustavo
Video.title: KARATE COMBAT: ONE WORLD - Abdalla Ibrahim vs. Dionicio Gustavo

Image.alt: KARATE COMBAT: ONE WORLD - Abdalla Ibrahim vs. Dionicio Gustavo
KARATE COMBAT: ONE WORLD - Abdalla Ibrahim vs. Dionicio Gustavo
KARATE COMBAT: ONE WORLD - Abdalla Ibrahim vs. Dionicio Gustavo

Video.summary: The Premier MMA promotion, Telecast live across the globe Showcasing some of the worlds best MMA athletes.
Video.grandparentTitle: Ultimate Warrior Challenge - Episode 01
Video.title: Ultimate Warrior Challenge - Episode 01

Image.alt: Ultimate Warrior Challenge - Episode 01
Ultimate Warrior Challenge - Episode 01
Ultimate Warrior Challenge - Episode 01

Video.summary: Ultimate Warrior Challenge is one of Europe's leading MMA shows, since it's inception in 2006 it's has grown steadily and delivered some of the most exciting MMA fights Europe has seen, with a truly Internationalfight roster, UWC has built a solid reputation for bringing some of the Worlds toughest fighters to square off in the UWC octagon, fighters from the UK, USA, Brazil, Sweden, Italy, Africa, Poland, France, Cyprus, Greece have all fought in the UWC cage. UFC stars such as Simeon Thoreson, Luke 'Bigslow' Barnatt, RiccoRodriguez,Thierry "The African Assassin" Sokoudjou, Phil De Fries, Paul Kelly to name but a few, have graced the UWC cage. UWC continues to grow and to bring the fight fans across Europe the fights they want to see.
Video.grandparentTitle: Ultimate Warrior Challenge - Episode 02
Video.title: Ultimate Warrior Challenge - Episode 02

Image.alt: Ultimate Warrior Challenge - Episode 02
Ultimate Warrior Challenge - Episode 02
Ultimate Warrior Challenge - Episode 02

Video.summary: Cory Knipe has been a professional MMA fighter since 2010. One of his biggest challenges has been to learn to effectively balance work and his MMA training. At HK36, he is up against heavy hitter Anton Tokarchuk in the Light Heavyweight Co-Main event.
Video.grandparentTitle: Out of the Cage - Cory Knipe
Video.title: Out of the Cage - Cory Knipe

Image.alt: Out of the Cage - Cory Knipe
Out of the Cage - Cory Knipe
Out of the Cage - Cory Knipe

Video.summary: Being a coach is incredibly important to TIm Blanchard. He says "everything is about the gym, everything is about my students". Learn how Tim had to make the hard decision to either fight or coach.
Video.grandparentTitle: Day in the Life of a Coach - Tim Blanchard
Video.title: Day in the Life of a Coach - Tim Blanchard

Image.alt: Day in the Life of a Coach - Tim Blanchard
Day in the Life of a Coach - Tim Blanchard
Day in the Life of a Coach - Tim Blanchard
